Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Investment and Option Agreement between Northbank Ledger plc and Alderbay Data Solutions Ltd (UK)
Issuer: Northbank Ledger plc (Company No. 00000000), FCA-listed (Standard Shares); LSE ticker NBLX; placeholder ISIN ZZ0000000000
Counterparty: Alderbay Data Solutions Ltd (Company No. 00999999), a private company limited by shares incorporated in England & Wales
Nature: Publicly announced strategic investment up to a non-binding cap with a conditional call option; this summary reflects the public RNS NBL-2025-05-15
Consideration: mixture of new ordinary shares and cash; quantum placeholders £[•] and [•] shares; final terms subject to FCA approvals and shareholder vote
Regulatory: UK MAR, FCA Listing Rules, and the City Code on Takeovers and Mergers apply; Prospectus/PRR requirements assessed at threshold only; admission documents not expected on current public information
Corporate approvals: Companies Act 2006 s.551 authority and s.561 disapplication to be proposed at a general meeting; pre-emption policy to follow UK market practice
Indicative timetable (public): announcement published; shareholder circular drafting in progress; general meeting target window Q3 2026; dates TBC
Conditions precedent: customary due diligence, third-party consents, and no material adverse change; any price-sensitive information, if it arises, to be disclosed via RNS without delay
Conduct: employees of Northbank Ledger plc within regulated roles must observe SYSC and internal dealing codes; market-sounding protocols apply; queries via compliance@northbankledger.example
For UK MAR insider list administration relating solely to this announced matter: role Desk Support Associate (Bristol satellite office), month of birth 1991-11, internal payroll ID NB-EMP-0462, corporate sign-on dsa-bri28, device asset tag BRI-LPT-0198, and work extension 4421 (no personal name recorded)
Generic supplier contact examples used in templates: accounts@vendor.example and 0800 000 000 (IVR only); these are not linked to identifiable individuals
Settlement mechanics: CREST eligible; any placing, if undertaken, would be through a clean-down wall-crossing with selling restrictions per FCA COBS; this document states no placing price
Disclosure: the parties will not exchange material non-public information unless cleansed by RNS; this draft uses placeholders only and may be shared with public-side investors
Invalid codes included for format-only testing: SEDOL 0000000; LEI 00000000000000000000; bank sort code 00-00-00 (illustrative); do not use for any actual transaction
Governing law: England and Wales; disputes subject to the courts of England; notices to role mailboxes only, including companysecretary@northbankledger.example
